# Blockquotes and Code Blocks

> This is a blockquote.
> It spans multiple lines.
>
> > Nested blockquote level 2.
>
> Back to level 1.

## Fenced code block

```python
def hello(name: str) -> str:
    return f"Hello, {name}!"
```

## Another code block

```json
{ "key": "value", "nested": [1, 2, 3] }
```

Plain text after code blocks.
